items.title: Customer segmentation after ratio engineering
items.description: Marketing teams engineer engagement ratios from event logs and cluster users with k-means; a StandardScaler on the numeric branch prevents spend-heavy columns from defining cluster centroids.

items.title: Churn scoring with Ridge on engineered tenure features
items.description: Product analytics builds `log_mrr`, `support_tickets_per_month`, and `tenure_days`; Ridge pipelines scale the continuous branch so λ penalties reflect true contribution.

items.title: Fraud detection with gradient boosting
items.description: Risk engineers add `amount_to_limit_ratio` and velocity counts, train HistGradientBoosting without a scaler branch, and reserve scaling for a later k-NN similarity layer if added.

items.title: Recommendation reranking with mixed embeddings
items.description: Search systems combine normalized embedding vectors with engineered popularity scores; ColumnTransformer scales only the score column before k-NN reranking so vector geometry is not drowned out.
